nodes.label: ms_decode
nodes.description: Converts L/R to Mid/Side: Mid=L+R, Side=L-R

nodes.label: mid_chain (user processing)
nodes.description: Mono processing chain for mid (centre) signal. Contains mid_gain placeholder.

nodes.label: side_chain (user processing)
nodes.description: Mono processing chain for side (stereo width) signal. Contains side_gain placeholder.

nodes.label: ms_encode
nodes.description: Converts Mid/Side back to L/R: L=(M+S)/2, R=(M-S)/2

nodes.label: mid_gain.Value
nodes.description: Internal gain for mid signal (0..1, default 1.0)

nodes.label: side_gain.Value
nodes.description: Internal gain for side signal (0..1, default 1.0)

nodes.label: Stereo Out (L/R)
nodes.description: Re-encoded stereo output after M/S processing
